name: Kris Kristofferson
description: American country singer, songwriter and actor (1936-2024)
abstract: Kristoffer Kristofferson (June 22, 1936 – September 28, 2024) was an American musician, songwriter, and actor. He was a pioneering figure in the outlaw country movement of the 1970s, moving away from the polished Nashville sound and toward a more raw, introspective style.

concerts.label: Kris Kristofferson with Ian and Sylvia
George Jones and Kris Kristofferson
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: Also, it was where I heard Billy Joel for the first time, live. He was on that tour, and Kris Kristofferson and Rita Coolidge. They were also in that whole group.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bernie Kirsh
about_quotes.evidence: I mean there would be Carly Simon opening for Kris Kristofferson, you know it was that era, but major acts.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bernie Kirsh interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 27, 2022
